item.name: Bloodfresh Tuna
item.description:
Its blood red meat is the centerpiece of many expensive dishes, though some claim it is chosen more for its appearance than its taste.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This wide-ranging ocean fish is hauled in from the coastal waters of the north seas. When freshly carved, its fillets are praised for their bright, bloody hue and delectable flavor.
